subcodes.first_line: The Promised One hath rent asunder the veils, and the Hidden Mystery hath shone forth from the horizon of manifestation. He is the Desired One Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت موعود کشف حجبات فرمود و غیب مکنون از افق ظهور اشراق نمود اوست مقصودیکه در
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
